category_sources: Official Elastic docs at https://www.elastic.co/docs/reference/beats/metricbeat describe Metricbeat as a lightweight shipper for system and service metrics
source_facts.description: Collect metrics from your systems and services
docs_sources: Official Elastic Metricbeat quick start documentation
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already present: https://github.com/elastic/beats; per instruction, not re-determined
tags_sources: Official Elastic docs describe collecting metrics from operating systems and services and shipping to Elasticsearch, Logstash, Redis, or Kafka
